title: Real iOS parity — stable identifiers, discovery, and screenshot path

context.text: Started from live FitKind proof session. Root causes already reproed: devicectl --json-output /dev/stdout fails on this macOS/Xcode combination, devicectl platform strings are human-readable (iOS/watchOS) rather than only com.apple.* identifiers, real-device screenshot path in simemu still points at removed devicectl screenshot command, and real iPhone identifier must align with xcdevice/libimobiledevice UDID for build+screenshot parity.
